policy.trainValidationSplit: first 70% train, trailing 30% validation within train session
policy.target: referencePoll position at anchor time + horizon
policy.predictionTarget: residual over product_constant_velocity_v8_shape with fixed common gates

simdEstimate.basis: sampled PyTorch CPU inference scaled by model family and capped by a rough 90 GFLOP/s scalar+SIMD budget
